experiments.name: Collection page improvement — adventure-cat-gear
experiments.target_caption: Impressions per day · goal over 30 days

sprints.title: Add Zeppelin link to cat training guide
Fix title tag — best cat names article

queue.title: Push to page 1 — portable-litterbox
queue.rationale:
Ranking pos 13.4 for 'travel litter box' — 874 impressions but page 2

Evidence: pos=13.4 | impressions=874 | clicks=14 | CTR=1.6%
Engine priority: 6.0  •  Dashboard impact: 34.47

execution_brief.action: Rewrite product page intro + add 1 contextual internal link from the 'best cat carriers' blog post.
execution_brief.summary: Page ranks pos 13 for 'travel litter box'. Two gaps: (1) intro copy buries the 'portable' benefit past the fold, (2) no topical authority signal from related blog content.

steps.title: Rewrite product description — first 2 paragraphs only
steps.before: The OutdoorBengal portable litter box is designed for cats on the go. Made from durable materials, it folds for easy transport.
steps.after:
Made for cats who travel. This collapsible litter box folds flat in 3 seconds, fits under any car seat, and sets up without tools — so your cat has a clean, familiar spot whether you're at a weekend cabin or across the country.

Includes a splash-resistant liner and a sealed zippered base that contains odors on long drives. Tested by 400+ customers on road trips, flights, and RV life.
steps.note: Keep the rest of the page unchanged. We're testing whether the intro rewrite alone lifts CTR from SERP.

steps.title: Add internal link from related blog post
steps.location: Shopify → Blog posts → 'Best Cat Carriers for Road Trips' → find the sentence mentioning litter
steps.before: You'll also want to bring a travel litter solution — most cats refuse to hold it for more than 4 hours.
steps.after: You'll also want to bring a [portable litter box](/products/portable-litterbox) — most cats refuse to hold it for more than 4 hours.
steps.note: Use the exact anchor text 'portable litter box'. Lowercase, no quotes.

out_of_scope: Do not touch the page title or meta description (separate future test).
Do not add more than one internal link in this sprint.
execution_brief.definition_of_done: Both edits are live on the published site and visible at /products/portable-litterbox and /blogs/clicker-training-cats/best-cat-carriers-road-trips. Reply DONE - #006 in the dashboard.

queue.title: Conversion fix — clicker-training-starter-kit
queue.rationale:
226 organic sessions but only 0.44% conversion — revenue leak

Evidence: sessions=226 | CR=0.44% | ATC=7.1% | AOV=$30
Engine priority: 5.5  •  Dashboard impact: 26.92

execution_brief.action: Move 'Add to Cart' above the fold on mobile and rewrite the first headline to name the outcome, not the product.
execution_brief.summary: Bounce rate on mobile is 68% vs 41% desktop. The buy button only appears after 2 scrolls on mobile, and the headline leads with the product name instead of the outcome.

steps.title: Rewrite the page H1
steps.location: Shopify → Products → clicker-training-starter-kit → Title visible on page
steps.before: Clicker Training Starter Kit for Cats
steps.after: Teach Your Cat 5 Tricks in 2 Weeks — Complete Clicker Kit
steps.note: This is the on-page H1, not the SEO title tag. Leave the SEO title alone.

steps.title: Reorder product page blocks (mobile-first)
steps.before: Gallery → Title → Long description → Variants → Add to Cart
steps.after: Gallery → Title → Variants → Add to Cart → Long description
steps.note: On mobile, Add to Cart must be visible without scrolling once the gallery is closed. Verify on a real phone before marking DONE.

out_of_scope: Do not change pricing, variants, or inventory.
Do not rewrite the long description — only the H1 and block order.
Do not touch the desktop layout (it already works).
execution_brief.definition_of_done: Open /products/clicker-training-starter-kit on your phone. The Add to Cart button is visible without scrolling past the variants. The H1 reads 'Teach Your Cat 5 Tricks in 2 Weeks — Complete Clicker Kit'. Reply DONE - #012.

queue.rationale:
Missing custom SEO title — 35314 impressions using default title

Evidence: seo_title=NOT_SET | impressions=35314 | current_title='What Tricks Can a Cat Learn (12 Cat Tricks + How t'
Engine priority: 4.17  •  Dashboard impact: 18.97

execution_brief.action: Set the SEO title tag on this blog post. One field only.
execution_brief.summary: Post gets 35,007 impressions/month but has no custom SEO title — Google is using the truncated default, killing CTR.

steps.title: Set the SEO title tag
steps.location: Shopify → Blog posts → 'What tricks can a cat learn' → Edit website SEO → Page title
steps.before: (empty — Google is pulling the truncated H1)
steps.after: 12 Cat Tricks You Can Teach This Week (Full List + How-To)
steps.note: Exactly 57 characters. Keyword first, specific number, action phrase. Do not add year — it will go stale.

out_of_scope: Do not change the meta description (separate future test).
Do not edit the H1 visible on the page.
Do not touch the URL slug.
execution_brief.definition_of_done: View page source at /blogs/clicker-training-cats/what-tricks-can-a-cat-learn... — the <title> tag reads '12 Cat Tricks You Can Teach This Week (Full List + How-To)'. Reply DONE - #050.

queue.title: Add Zeppelin link to cat training guide
queue.rationale:
Cat training guide currently ranks position 4 for "clicker training cats"
with ~1.2k monthly impressions. Zero internal links point to the Zeppelin
product page. Adding a contextual link in the "tools you'll need" section
should drive meaningful referral traffic.

execution_brief.action: Add one contextual internal link from the cat training guide to the Zeppelin product page.
execution_brief.summary: Training guide ranks pos 4 for 'clicker training cats' with 1.2k monthly impressions. Currently zero internal links to Zeppelin — adding one contextual link should pass topical relevance.

steps.title: Add the internal link
steps.location: Shopify → Blog posts → 'Cat Training Guide' → find the 'Tools you'll need' section
steps.before: A quality harness is essential for outdoor training sessions — you want something escape-proof but comfortable enough for long walks.
steps.after: A quality harness is essential for outdoor training sessions — we recommend the [Zeppelin escape-proof cat harness](/products/zeppelin-cat-carrier), designed to be secure on active cats without restricting movement during walks.
steps.note: Anchor text: 'Zeppelin escape-proof cat harness'. Place inside the existing 'Tools you'll need' paragraph — do not add a new section.

out_of_scope: Do not add more than one link. We're measuring the impact of a single placement.
Do not modify the Zeppelin product page itself.
Do not change other parts of the training guide.
execution_brief.definition_of_done: The link is live at /blogs/clicker-training-cats/cat-training-guide in the 'Tools you'll need' section, pointing to /products/zeppelin-cat-carrier. Reply DONE - #002.

queue.title: Fix title tag — best cat names article
queue.rationale:
Article has 114K impressions at average position 12.6 but CTR of 0.27%
is well below the positional benchmark of ~2%. Current title is
generic. Testing a more specific, benefit-driven title.

active.name: Cannibalization fix — Zeppelin redirect
active.rationale:
Two pages were competing for the same query cluster. Implemented 301
redirect from the older generic page to the Zeppelin product page.
Expecting CTR lift as Google consolidates rankings.

active.name: Conversion fix — zeppelin-cat-carrier
active.rationale:
4772 organic sessions but only 0.86% conversion — revenue leak

Engine priority: 5.5  •  Dashboard impact: 39.43

archive.name: Copy rewrite — Extra Safe Harness
archive.evaluation_details:
Baseline measured over 14 days pre-change. Post-change measured over
14 days following a 7-day stabilization window. Statistical significance
confirmed via 2-proportion z-test (p < 0.05).
